blurb: watchOS implements the same hardware-rooted secure boot chain used by other Apple platforms, with each boot stage cryptographically verified before execution. The Apple Watch Secure Enclave manages biometric keys and Data Protection class keys analogously to iPhone. OTA software updates are cryptographically verified using System Software Authorization before installation. The watchOS pairing security model binds the watch cryptographically to a specific iPhone using a shared symmetric key established during pairing, ensuring that data exchanged between iPhone and Apple Watch over Bluetooth uses authenticated and encrypted channels.
